features.description: Hook matchers with hyphenated identifiers now exact-match instead of substring-matching, requiring updated patterns.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed hook matchers with hyphenated identifiers (e.g. `code-reviewer`, `mcp__brave-search`) accidentally substring-matching — they now exact-match. Use `mcp__brave-search__.*` to match all tools from a hyphenated MCP server.

features.description: External plugins enabled via project .claude/settings.json now require explicit install consent on all loader paths.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed external plugins enabled only by project `.claude/settings.json` not requiring explicit install consent on every loader path

features.description: New CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE_CLICKS env var disables mouse click/drag/hover in fullscreen while preserving wheel scroll
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE_CLICKS` to disable mouse click/drag/hover in fullscreen mode while keeping wheel scroll
